zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Newmarch於大約1203年出生在英國越可爾沃莫斯利時，他的父親Adam de Newmarch II39歲，母親Margeria de Bosville31歲。他和Mrs. Adam de Newmarch至少有1個女兒。他去世於1303年1月20日在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特 卡素享年101歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾朋特福拉可特。

nameMeanings.name: Newmarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Neufmarché (Seine-Maritime). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

variants.name: Newmark
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Chayim, Meyer, Shlomo, Vigdor.
Americanized form of Scandinavian Nymark: habitational name from farms named with ny ‘new’ + mark ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Neumark  .

variants.name: Anglo-Norman Families
meanings: 2  Norman, English: locative name from Martinvast (in Manche, France). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Newmarch was born about 1203, in Womersley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Adam de Newmarch II, was 39 and his mother, Margeria de Bosville, was 31. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs. Adam de Newmarch. He died on 20 January 1303, in Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 101, and was buried in Pontefract, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Newmarch est né environ 1203, à Womersley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Newmarch II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margeria de Bosville, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mrs. Adam de Newmarch. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1303, à Pontefract Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 101 ans, et a été enterré à Pontefract, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Newmarch um 1203 in Womersley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Newmarch II 39 und seine Mutter Margeria de Bosville 31. Er hatte mit Mrs. Adam de Newmarch mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Januar 1303 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Pontefract, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mrs. Adam de Newmarch. Morì il 20 gennaio 1303, nel Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 101 anni, e fu sepolto a Pontefract, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Newmarchが約1203年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオメルスリーで生まれた時，父Adam de Newmarch IIは39歳，母Margeria de Bosvilleは31歳であった。彼はMrs. Adam de Newmarchとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1303年1月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクト カストルで101歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Newmarch(이)가 대략 1203년 영국 요르크실르 보머슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Newmarch II(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margeria de Bosville(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Mrs. Adam de Newmarch(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 1월 20일 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트 카스틀에서 101세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mrs. Adam de Newmarch. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Newmarch родился около 1203 г. в местности вомирсли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Newmarch II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margeria de Bosville, 31. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mrs. Adam de Newmarch. Он умер 20 января 1303 г. в местности понтефракт кастл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 101 год и был похоронен в местности понтефракт, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
